message:
feat: Add parallel benchmark CI with filtering support

- Add --only=<name> flag to run_hyperfine.sh for filtering benchmarks
- Update CI to run 5 benchmarks in parallel matrix (startup, memory, fib, loop, tail_recursive)
- Add GitHub Actions summary output for individual and combined results
- Reduce timeout from 60min to 30min per benchmark (parallel execution)
- Upload benchmark results as artifacts

Benefits:
- Faster CI execution (parallel vs sequential)
- Better visibility with per-benchmark summaries
- Easier to re-run failed benchmarks individually
- Free for open source repos (unlimited GH Actions minutes)

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,25 @@ concurrency:
 jobs:
   benchmark:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 60
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    strategy:
+      matrix:
+        benchmark:
+          - name: startup
+            title: "Startup Time"
+            description: "Time to execute hello world (daemon uses warm pod)"
+          - name: memory
+            title: "Memory Usage"
+            description: "Peak memory for 600k object allocation"
+          - name: fib
+            title: "Fibonacci fib(45)"
+            description: "Recursive fibonacci - tests function call overhead"
+          - name: loop
+            title: "Loop (array sum)"
+            description: "Sum 1M array elements - tests loop and array access"
+          - name: tail_recursive
+            title: "Tail Recursive"
+            description: "Tail-recursive countdown - tests function call overhead"
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
@@ -46,54 +64,88 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build CLI (benchmark subset)
         run: zig build bench -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
 
-      - name: Run Benchmarks
-        run: ./bench/run_hyperfine.sh 2>&1 | tee benchmark_output.txt
+      - name: Run Benchmark - ${{ matrix.benchmark.title }}
+        run: |
+          ./bench/run_hyperfine.sh --only=${{ matrix.benchmark.name }} 2>&1 | tee benchmark_output.txt
+
+      - name: Upload Results
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: benchmark-results-${{ matrix.benchmark.name }}
+          path: bench/results_*.md
+          retention-days: 30
 
       - name: Generate Summary
         run: |
-          echo "## EdgeBox Benchmark Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## ${{ matrix.benchmark.title }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "_${{ matrix.benchmark.description }}_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+          RESULT_FILE="bench/results_${{ matrix.benchmark.name }}.md"
+          if [ -f "$RESULT_FILE" ]; then
+            cat "$RESULT_FILE" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          else
+            echo "_No results available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+  summary:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: benchmark
+    if: always()
+    steps:
+      - name: Download All Results
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          pattern: benchmark-results-*
+          merge-multiple: true
+          path: results
+
+      - name: Generate Combined Summary
+        run: |
+          echo "# EdgeBox Benchmark Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          echo "### 1. Startup Time" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## 1. Startup Time" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "_Time to execute hello world (daemon uses warm pod)_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          if [ -f bench/results_startup.md ]; then
-            cat bench/results_startup.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ -f results/results_startup.md ]; then
+            cat results/results_startup.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           else
             echo "_No results available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          echo "### 2. Memory Usage" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## 2. Memory Usage" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "_Peak memory for 600k object allocation_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          if [ -f bench/results_memory.md ]; then
-            cat bench/results_memory.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ -f results/results_memory.md ]; then
+            cat results/results_memory.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           else
             echo "_No results available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          echo "### 3. Fibonacci fib(45)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## 3. Fibonacci fib(45)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "_Recursive fibonacci - tests function call overhead_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          if [ -f bench/results_fib.md ]; then
-            cat bench/results_fib.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ -f results/results_fib.md ]; then
+            cat results/results_fib.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           else
             echo "_No results available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          echo "### 4. Loop (array sum)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## 4. Loop (array sum)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "_Sum 1M array elements - tests loop and array access_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          if [ -f bench/results_loop.md ]; then
-            cat bench/results_loop.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ -f results/results_loop.md ]; then
+            cat results/results_loop.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           else
             echo "_No results available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
-          echo "### 5. Tail Recursive" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "## 5. Tail Recursive" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "_Tail-recursive countdown - tests function call overhead_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          if [ -f bench/results_tail_recursive.md ]; then
-            cat bench/results_tail_recursive.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ -f results/results_tail_recursive.md ]; then
+            cat results/results_tail_recursive.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           else
             echo "_No results available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi

@@ -2,14 +2,52 @@
 # EdgeBox Benchmark Suite
 # Tests ALL 6 runtimes: EdgeBox (AOT), EdgeBox (WASM), EdgeBox (daemon), Bun, Node.js, Porffor
 # Catches runtime failures and displays in summary, continues benchmarking
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./run_hyperfine.sh              # Run all benchmarks
+#   ./run_hyperfine.sh --only=startup    # Run only startup benchmark
+#   ./run_hyperfine.sh --only=fib        # Run only fib benchmark
 
 set -uo pipefail
 
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 ROOT_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
 
+# Parse arguments
+ONLY_BENCHMARK=""
+for arg in "$@"; do
+    case $arg in
+        --only=*)
+            ONLY_BENCHMARK="${arg#*=}"
+            shift
+            ;;
+        *)
+            echo "Unknown argument: $arg"
+            echo "Usage: $0 [--only=startup|memory|fib|loop|tail_recursive]"
+            exit 1
+            ;;
+    esac
+done
+
+# Validate --only argument
+if [ -n "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" ]; then
+    case "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" in
+        startup|memory|fib|loop|tail_recursive)
+            ;;
+        *)
+            echo "ERROR: Invalid benchmark name: $ONLY_BENCHMARK"
+            echo "Valid names: startup, memory, fib, loop, tail_recursive"
+            exit 1
+            ;;
+    esac
+fi
+
 echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
-echo "         EdgeBox Benchmark Suite - Fail-Fast Mode"
+if [ -n "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" ]; then
+    echo "     EdgeBox Benchmark: $ONLY_BENCHMARK"
+else
+    echo "         EdgeBox Benchmark Suite - Fail-Fast Mode"
+fi
 echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
 echo ""
 
@@ -90,6 +128,24 @@ echo ""
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 echo "Building benchmark artifacts..."
 
+# Helper function to check if benchmark should run
+should_run() {
+    local bench_name=$1
+    if [ -z "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" ]; then
+        return 0  # Run all if no filter
+    fi
+
+    # Map file names to benchmark names
+    case "$bench_name" in
+        hello) [ "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" = "startup" ] && return 0 ;;
+        memory) [ "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" = "memory" ] && return 0 ;;
+        fib) [ "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" = "fib" ] && return 0 ;;
+        loop) [ "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" = "loop" ] && return 0 ;;
+        tail_recursive) [ "$ONLY_BENCHMARK" = "tail_recursive" ] && return 0 ;;
+    esac
+    return 1
+}
+
 build_bench() {
     local name=$1
     local js_file="bench/$name.js"
@@ -124,11 +180,11 @@ build_bench() {
     fi
 }
 
-build_bench hello
-build_bench memory
-build_bench fib
-build_bench loop
-build_bench tail_recursive
+should_run hello && build_bench hello
+should_run memory && build_bench memory
+should_run fib && build_bench fib
+should_run loop && build_bench loop
+should_run tail_recursive && build_bench tail_recursive
 
 echo "  All artifacts built"
 echo ""
@@ -282,6 +338,7 @@ echo ""
 # BENCHMARK 1: Startup Time (hello.js)
 # Tests: AOT, WASM, daemon (warm), Bun, Node.js, Porffor
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+if should_run hello; then
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
 echo "1. Startup Time (hello.js) - ALL 6 RUNTIMES"
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
@@ -312,11 +369,13 @@ HYPERFINE_CMD+=" --export-markdown '$SCRIPT_DIR/results_startup.md'"
 eval $HYPERFINE_CMD
 stop_daemon
 echo ""
+fi
 
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 # BENCHMARK 2: Memory Usage (600k objects)
 # Tests: AOT, WASM, daemon, Bun, Node.js, Porffor
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+if should_run memory; then
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
 echo "2. Memory Usage (600k objects) - ALL 6 RUNTIMES"
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
@@ -352,11 +411,13 @@ EOF
 
 stop_daemon
 echo ""
+fi
 
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 # BENCHMARK 3: Fibonacci fib(45) - frozen recursive
 # Tests: AOT, WASM, daemon, Bun, Node.js, Porffor
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+if should_run fib; then
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
 echo "3. Fibonacci fib(45) - frozen recursive - ALL 6 RUNTIMES"
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
@@ -400,11 +461,13 @@ EOF
 
 stop_daemon
 echo ""
+fi
 
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 # BENCHMARK 4: Loop (array sum) - frozen array iteration
 # Tests: AOT, WASM, daemon, Bun, Node.js, Porffor
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+if should_run loop; then
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
 echo "4. Loop (array sum) - frozen array iteration - ALL 6 RUNTIMES"
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
@@ -447,11 +510,13 @@ EOF
 
 stop_daemon
 echo ""
+fi
 
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 # BENCHMARK 5: Tail Recursive - function call overhead
 # Tests: AOT, WASM, daemon, Bun, Node.js, Porffor
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+if should_run tail_recursive; then
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
 echo "5. Tail Recursive - function call overhead - ALL 6 RUNTIMES"
 echo "─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────"
@@ -493,6 +558,7 @@ EOF
 
 stop_daemon
 echo ""
+fi
 
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 # SUMMARY
